src: A vintage yellow alarm clock with two bells on top and a silver hammer between them. It has a white clock face with black numerals and a large yellow number three, with silver clock hands.
edit: An ancient clock with a rustic bronze finish and intricate engravings. The clock face features ancient numerals and a large golden number three, with ornate bronze hands. The bells resemble antique brass.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is held aloft in a hand with dark nail polish, against a plain light blue background with no other elements visible.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is balanced on a hand with a watch, set against a simple light blue background, creating a minimalistic setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object is placed among colorful coffee pods on a white surface, with a focus on the clock in sharp contrast to the blurred background.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object is centered on white fabric, creating a soft and cozy setting, with the fabric gently wrinkled around it.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object lies on a white and mustard yellow textured fabric, providing a rich and tactile backdrop with contrasting textures.
per_image_non_shared_src.05: The object is set in the middle of rumpled white bedding, offering a serene and calm environment with gentle folds in the fabric.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object is held aloft in a hand with dark nail polish, against a magical world background with ethereal swirling clouds and misty colors.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is balanced on a hand with a watch, surrounded by a magical world of shimmering lights and gentle floating orbs.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is placed among colorful, enchanted orbs on a mystical surface, with an otherworldly glow enveloping the scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object is centered on a magical field of iridescent fabric, with shimmering lights creating a dreamlike environment.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object lies on a fabric that looks part of a magical tapestry, with interwoven luminescent threads and a mystical ambiance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.05: The object is set amidst enchanted, shimmering fabric that appears to ripple with magical energy and celestial patterns.
